registry_refs.notes: Registry apex harvardilj.org no longer resolves; the working publication moved to the shared Harvard journals host.

publication_scope.notes: Other publications on the shared host are out of scope.

evidence.notes: DNS resolution failed; local sitemap history records migration to journals.law.harvard.edu/ilj/.
First of six numbered archive pages. It contains issue posts, direct PDF links, titles, By-lines, volume/issue labels, front matter, mastheads, and a next-page link.

reconnaissance.notes: Stopped after the first canonical archive page when asked to finalize. Oldest, middle, and newest issue pages and PDF response behavior remain unsampled.

scope.notes: The WIPO special edition and HILJ/HALO collaboration should be classified as supplements before inclusion.

entry_points.notes: Working publication-scoped archive after the apex migration.

nodes.notes: Archive post containing issue metadata and direct PDFs.
Direct article PDF under the ILJ upload directory.

edges.notes: The first page embeds issue contents as well as links to issue posts.
Exclude Front Matter, Masthead, and Table of Contents link text.

archive_patterns.notes: Some older file paths may add year/month segments; not yet sampled.

pagination.termination: Stop when the next link is absent; page one indicated six total pages.
pagination.notes: Only page one was fetched in this bounded run.

layout_eras.label: Observed WordPress issue-post archive
layout_eras.notes: Page one exposed volumes 60-63 in post bodies; menu links showed later volumes, but those pages were not sampled. Earlier archive pages remain unsampled.

sources.example: A New Framework for Digital Taxation
Reuven Avi-Yonah, Young Ran (Christine) Kim & Karen Sam
sources.notes: Author text is not a dedicated link selector in the sampled output.

abstract.missingness: No abstracts appeared on the sampled archive page.
abstract.notes: PDF or issue-page inspection remains untested.

sources.locator: issue-post date and issue URL year segment
sources.notes: Use post date only after confirming it tracks publication year.
May be a WordPress post date rather than print publication date.

normalization: emit YYYY-MM-DD when day precision exists

sources.notes: Special editions require a nonnumeric issue label.

pages.missingness: No page ranges were visible in the sampled archive.

doi.missingness: Not checked beyond the archive page.

citation.missingness: No recommended citations appeared on the archive page.

patterns.notes: Links appear direct, but no PDF response was requested after the parent asked to finalize.

barriers.notes: The registry apex harvardilj.org does not resolve; use the canonical /ilj/ path on the Harvard journals host.

access.politeness_notes: Keep all requests under /ilj/, wait at least 10 seconds between requests on the shared host, and stop pagination when next is absent.

verdict.summary: The migrated WordPress archive exposes direct PDFs and deterministic next-link pagination, but only page one was sampled and no file response was validated.
blockers: Oldest and middle archive pages remain unsampled
verdict.next_action: Sample archive pages 3 and 6 plus one issue page, then perform one article-PDF smoke while respecting the 10-second crawl delay.
verdict.implementation_notes: Update future routing to the canonical Harvard journals host; do not use harvardilj.org as a seed.
